spec.name: Forest Clearing
spec.description: A small clearing interrupts the Darkwood's canopy, letting in a pale column of daylight that falls on a carpet of wildflowers and soft grass. The contrast with the surrounding forest is immediate — it feels exposed here, open, which the local wildlife has evidently decided is worth the risk. A fallen log at the clearing's edge provides a natural seat and a good view of the treeline. The trail west leads back to Millbrook's east gate; trails branch east into the forest, south into a rougher camp site among the pines, and north toward the sound of axes.
